productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Brown Casual Handbag
description: Update your style quotient with ease by adding this stylish bag from lino perros. Roomy and comfortable to carry, the smooth silhouette of this bag blends well with any outfit. Height: 25 cmWidth: 29 cmDepth: 13 cm Made of leatherette with a traditional design and metallic embellishments on the front for added style Has one zippered compartment with two inner zippered pouches that have organiser sleeves for a mobile and essentials Two short handles for carrying ease and style One zippered compartment at the back for additional space Metallic embelishments and buckles for a chic look Bag care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
